description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gray, multi-gabled roof and a light-colored exterior. The front features a covered porch supported by slender columns, a prominent garage, and a recessed main entryway. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, with black trim providing contrast against the white walls. The roofline is complex, combining intersecting gables and hips for architectural interest. The house includes a carport on one side, offering sheltered parking, and a small balcony or overhang above the main entrance. The overall design is clean and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional, geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gabled roof, white exterior, symmetrical windows, and a covered porch with a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall, roof complexity, and absence of windows or doors.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage door, side entry, and additional windows along the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, side wall, and roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a covered porch, slender columns, and an overhanging roof above the door.
